goal: Populate billing-boundary fixture: cross-subsystem boundary anti_pattern

summary.title: Populate billing-boundary fixture (5/8 catalog)
summary.what: Replace the stub entry with a fully-populated fixture: two seed intents (boundary rule + specific API) with high-severity anti_patterns; task drives the cross-subsystem-write temptation; Forbidden list bans the three obvious shortcuts.
summary.why: Eval catalog had 4 populated + 4 stubs. Bringing it to 5 populated improves coverage of the spec §9 Step-5 fixture set and adds the cross-subsystem-boundary case the others did not exercise.

decisions.chose: separate the boundary rule from the specific API
decisions.rationale: mirrors how teams actually record this — one intent says do not cross the boundary; another records the right API for the new feature; retrieval should surface both

followups: Populate risk-aware-tests, docs-only-intent, refactor-cross-file to round out the spec §9 fixture set
Step 5.5: publish eval results once the LLM-runner is wired up to a real CLI
